marketing.heroTitle: AI-tailored resumes for every job you apply to
marketing.heroSubtitle: Fetch roles, generate a custom CV and cover letter matched to each JD, export PDF. One workflow, zero copy-paste.
marketing.demoJd1: Experience with Kubernetes and container orchestration...
marketing.demoCv1: Led **Kubernetes** migration for 200-service platform, reducing inter-service latency by 15%
marketing.demoCl2: My recent work in **cross-functional** delivery and stakeholder alignment has given me direct experience...
marketing.demoCv3: Built **Terraform** modules for multi-region AWS infrastructure, enabling zero-downtime deployments
marketing.howItWorksStep1Desc: Search LinkedIn, Seek, and CN platforms. New roles land in your inbox automatically.
marketing.howItWorksStep2Desc: AI matches your experience to each JD. Bullet-level tailoring with keyword bolding and quality gates.
marketing.howItWorksStep3Desc: One-click PDF export. ATS-optimized resume and cover letter, ready to send.
marketing.featureSkillPackDesc: 35 CV rules + 29 Cover rules. FAANG-recruiter grade quality with 18 self-validation checks.
marketing.featureAtsDesc: Keywords aligned to each JD. Bullet length under 200 chars. Passes Workday, Greenhouse, Lever.
marketing.featureBilingualDesc: Full en-AU and zh-CN support with locale-specific tone rules and templates.
marketing.featureBatchDesc: Generate tailored CVs for 10+ jobs in one batch. Claim-and-generate automation.
marketing.featureExternalAiDesc: Download Skill Pack ZIP. Import into Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini.
marketing.featureLatexDesc: Professional LaTeX-rendered PDFs. Not Word templates. Real typographic quality.
marketing.beforeAfterBefore: Worked on data processing and helped improve system performance
marketing.beforeAfterAfter: Designed **event-driven** data pipeline processing 2M+ events daily, reducing processing latency from 12s to 800ms
marketing.beforeAfterTagline: Every bullet. Every application. Grounded in YOUR experience.
marketing.finalCtaTitle: Stop sending the same resume everywhere
marketing.finalCtaSubtitle: No credit card required. Google or GitHub login.

resume.masterResumesDesc: Maintain multiple base resume versions and choose which one drives your CV and CL generation.

guide.welcomeDesc: We'll walk you through setting up your resume, fetching jobs, and generating your first tailored CV. Exit anytime.
guide.navigating: Taking you to the right page…
guide.waitingForElement: Select a job on the left to continue.
guide.task_resume_setup_desc: Save your base resume profile. This is the foundation for all tailored CVs.
guide.task_first_fetch_desc: Start a fetch run to import fresh job listings into your workspace.
guide.task_review_jobs_desc: Open a job to review the details and decide if it's worth applying for.
guide.task_generate_first_pdf_desc: Select a job and generate a tailored resume PDF from your master resume.
guide.task_mark_applied_desc: Mark a job as Applied to keep your application status organised.

resumeForm.versionCloneHint: New version clones the active resume by default. Active version drives CV and CL generation.
resumeForm.personalInfoDesc: Add the core details used across all applications.
resumeForm.title: Title
resumeForm.linksDesc: Add LinkedIn, GitHub, or portfolio URLs.
resumeForm.label: Label
resumeForm.summaryDesc: Share a concise summary of your strengths.
resumeForm.summaryPlaceholder: Write a concise summary that highlights your strengths.
resumeForm.keepAtLeastOne: Keep at least one master resume version.
resumeForm.atLeastOneRequired: At least one master resume version is required.
resumeForm.versionUpdated: Your selected master resume version has been updated.
resumeForm.toastAddDetailsFirstDesc: Fill in at least one section before previewing.
resumeForm.toastNewVersionCopyDesc: Started from your active version so you can edit only the differences.
resumeForm.toastCouldNotCreateVersionDesc: Please run migrations if needed and try again.
resumeForm.toastCannotDeleteOnlyDesc: Keep at least one master resume version.
resumeForm.toastSwitchedVersionDesc: Generation now uses the selected master resume.
resumeForm.toastSavedDesc: Your selected master resume version has been updated.
resumeForm.confirmDeleteVersion: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
resumeForm.previewSaveFirst: Save your resume first to generate a preview.
